headline: Assessing Edwards Lifesciences (EW) Valuation As Growth Hopes Contrast With Rich P/E Multiple
summary: Why Edwards Lifesciences (EW) Is On Investors’ Radar Today Edwards Lifesciences (EW) stock has been drawing attention after a mixed run, with a 1 year total return of 9.69% but negative moves over the past month and past 3 months.
